title: Use tmpfs for integration tests
body:

comments.body: @Luap99 It seems increasing CPU for `vfs` has some improvement.
Also `containerized_integration` came from `27` something to `19m`

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/235841ae-b30b-4380-9806-b246d5cb0788)

cirrus graph for the container task seems broken as this usage makes no sense.

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5a8348fd-014e-4710-ad8d-465af6eb9a9c)

Looking at another int test we do not seem max out the cpu much so I am not sure if 8 cores make much sense. Also memory usage seems quite low so I think we can reduce that as well.


Overall the first question is what is the goal here? 30 mins total CI like podman? What is the target time we are aiming for?
Once we know that we can see how much we want to bump the cores, because we also need to keep in mind of costs. If double the cores means 2/3 of the time then the costs will most likely be higher.

> Overall the first question is what is the goal here? 30 mins total CI like podman

I think we are already under 30mins, this PR was just an experiment. Increasing cores reduces time by a lot but yeah I don't think it's a good idea to keep throwing money at the problem if its not needed.

> > Overall the first question is what is the goal here? 30 mins total CI like podman
> 
> I think we are already under 30mins, this PR was just an experiment. Increasing cores reduces time by a lot but yeah I don't think it's a good idea to keep throwing money at the problem if its not needed.

I am talking about total time for CI to finish. Not just a single task time. There is a bit of overhead in scheduling tasks.

You need to look at the cirrus build page at the top it shows you `Finished in 57:37` on this PR (because it was not rebased on the unit test speedup)

> > > Overall the first question is what is the goal here? 30 mins total CI like podman
> > 
> > 
> > I think we are already under 30mins, this PR was just an experiment. Increasing cores reduces time by a lot but yeah I don't think it's a good idea to keep throwing money at the problem if its not needed.
> 
> I am talking about total time for CI to finish. Not just a single task time. There is a bit of overhead in scheduling tasks.
> 
> You need to look at the cirrus build page at the top it shows you `Finished in 57:37` on this PR (because it was not rebased on the unit test speedup)

Yes I am only talking about integration tests, waiting for this to merge for `unit` tests here https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5954
@Luap99 I see minor improvement in other tests but not in `containerized_integration`.
@Luap99 @nalind PTAL

Actually never mind we only set ` TMPDIR: '/var/tmp'` on the conformance vfs task per 8b0ecd78702589b650d1fd9bc301f7616b34d85f

So I think the tests were already using tmpfs
Putting this PR on draft and timing `tmpfs` changes again, I have created a new PR for resource bump https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5979
@Luap99 @nalind PTAL

Metrics

```
>> 29:07
| type        | user     | fs      |      d13 |      f40 |      f41 |
| ----------- | -------- | ------- | -------- | -------- | -------- |
| Unit        | root     | vfs     |          |    08:27 |          |
| Unit        | root     | overlay |          |    08:36 |          |
| Conformance | root     | vfs     |    22:48 |          |          |
| Conformance | root     | overlay |    12:12 |          |          |
| Integration | root     | vfs     |    11:51 |    18:36 |    13:03 |
| Integration | root     | overlay |    11:24 |          |    13:08 |
| Integration | rootless | overlay |    12:16 |          |    13:48 |
```

Without this PR metrics for https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5971

```
>> 28:11
| type        | user     | fs      |      d13 |      f40 |      f41 |
| ----------- | -------- | ------- | -------- | -------- | -------- |
| Unit        | root     | vfs     |          |    08:14 |          |
| Unit        | root     | overlay |          |    08:07 |          |
| Conformance | root     | vfs     |    20:49 |          |          |
| Conformance | root     | overlay |    11:24 |          |          |
| Integration | root     | vfs     |    19:27 |    17:31 |    15:56 |
| Integration | root     | overlay |    15:04 |          |    20:43 |
| Integration | rootless | overlay |    16:05 |          |    16:27 |
```

Strangely I see that most of the individual tests have gone down but for some reason PR https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5971 was faster than changes in this PR.

I think I would call it a scheduling flake because from metrics above we can see that most of the tests have gone down by switching to `tmpfs`.
Okay I have pushed a new version with hopefully fixes for flakes and speed up conformance tests.

Before I remove some commits just timing this PR.

```
>> 26:57
| type        | user     | fs      |      d13 |      f40 |      f41 |
| ----------- | -------- | ------- | -------- | -------- | -------- |
| Unit        | root     | vfs     |          |    08:18 |          |
| Unit        | root     | overlay |          |    08:18 |          |
| Conformance | root     | vfs     |    20:46 |          |          |
| Conformance | root     | overlay |    13:02 |          |          |
| Integration | root     | vfs     |    11:55 |    16:20 |    13:08 |
| Integration | root     | overlay |    11:17 |          |    11:18 |
| Integration | rootless | overlay |    12:22 |          |    14:01 |
```

Okay I pushed quite a few times and the flake is gone, here are the new timing

```
>> 26:01
| type        | user     | fs      |      d13 |      f40 |      f41 |
| ----------- | -------- | ------- | -------- | -------- | -------- |
| Unit        | root     | vfs     |          |    07:47 |          |
| Unit        | root     | overlay |          |    07:53 |          |
| Conformance | root     | vfs     |    19:37 |          |          |
| Conformance | root     | overlay |    10:24 |          |          |
| Integration | root     | vfs     |    11:50 |    17:42 |    11:52 |
| Integration | root     | overlay |    11:02 |          |    10:59 |
| Integration | rootless | overlay |    11:56 |          |    14:00 |
```

![Screenshot From 2025-02-15 09-29-41](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/1b3a636d-2413-4d14-8764-74a644fff426)

One cirrus it shows 24 mins for entire CI
@Luap99 @nalind PTAL, please see the commit message for flake fix.
@rhatdan @nalind @TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL
LGTM
/lgtm
@flouthoc you may need a rebase here.

> @flouthoc you may need a rebase here.

Done.
@rhatdan @nalind @TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL
LGTM
Rebased with `main`.
/approve
/approve
